logo.description: welco.ai text logo in dark color. Lowercase 'welco' with a dot styled as an 'o' followed by '.ai'. Simple, minimal text mark. No background badge. Positioned bottom-right corner consistently across all reference images.

background.usage: Solid light blue is the default (~75% of images). Gradient variant used in ~25% of images.

typeA-receptionistChat.trigger: pricing guides, how-to articles, feature explainers, AI receptionist topics
typeA-receptionistChat.headline: centered top, 2 lines
typeA-receptionistChat.visual: realistic receptionist photo with headset + chat conversation bubbles showing customer-AI dialog
typeA-receptionistChat.extras: optional caller photo (either side), accent icons (dollar, 24/7, calendar)

A1-receptionistAlone.description: Receptionist center/center-left, chat bubbles on right, NO caller photo. May include accent icons.

A2-receptionistAndCaller.description: Receptionist on one side, caller on the other, chat bubbles between them. Caller can be LEFT or RIGHT.

A3-receptionistWithProps.description: AI-illustrated receptionist holding tablet or near laptop/screen mockup. Usually paired with caller and 'AI Receptionists' label badge.

typeB-listicleComparison.trigger: best X services, top alternatives, comparison posts
typeB-listicleComparison.headline: centered top, 2 lines
typeB-listicleComparison.visual: horizontal row of overlapping circles with company logos (welco headset icon largest in center) OR scattered grid of rounded-square app icons
typeB-listicleComparison.extras: no receptionist photo, welco headset icon serves as brand identifier

B1-overlappingCircles.description: Horizontal row of overlapping circles with company logos. Welco headset icon largest in center with blue (#004CE6) outline.

B2-scatteredAppIcons.description: Organic/scattered grid of rounded-square app icons. Welco icon largest and central. Small curved arrow from competitor icon pointing to welco icon.

logoPlacement.style: dark text, no badge, directly on background
logoPlacement.visibility: present in ~87% of images; omitted in some listicle layouts where welco headset icon is central

visualStyle.imageStyle: realistic receptionist photography and AI-generated renders with chat conversation UI overlays

photographyComposition.receptionistSubject: smiling professional woman with over-ear headset, blazer/business casual, friendly and approachable. MULTIPLE different women are used -- variety in hair color, style, ethnicity is expected.
photographyComposition.receptionistPositioning: varies: center, center-left, or center-right of canvas, shoulders up or upper body

options: no frame -- photo directly on background (~50% of Type A)

photographyComposition.receptionistProps: sometimes holding tablet or near laptop/screen (AI-illustrated variants)

callerPhoto.presence: optional, present in ~67% of Type A images
callerPhoto.positioning: flexible -- LEFT or RIGHT side, opposite the receptionist
callerPhoto.frame: circular frame (gray/light border), rectangular photo, or small square with rounded corners
callerPhoto.size: varies from small thumbnail (~60-80px) to large photo (~200px+)

photographyComposition.photoStyle: mix of realistic high-quality photography AND AI-generated realistic renders, clean background, bright lighting

chatConversationUI.description: Primary visual storytelling element -- demonstrates the AI receptionist in action
chatConversationUI.placement: center or center-right of canvas, between receptionist and caller (or beside receptionist if no caller)
chatConversationUI.messageCount: 2-4 alternating exchanges (customer - AI - customer - AI); most show 3-4, minimum observed is 2
chatConversationUI.content: realistic appointment booking and service request conversations (book appointment, confirm time, send confirmation, request estimate, schedule service)
chatConversationUI.shadow: very subtle drop shadow on bubbles

dollarIcon.style: blue (#004CE6) circle with white dollar sign, 50-60px

twentyFourSevenIcon.style: blue circle with 24/7 text and circular dashed arrows, 50-60px

calendarIcon.style: blue circle with calendar symbol and circular arrows

greenStatusDot.style: solid green (#4CAF50) circle, 15-40px (size varies), online indicator

headsetIconSmall.usage: decorative in Type A layouts near chat area

headsetIconLarge.style: welco brand headset symbol in large rounded square, central

aiReceptionistsLabel.usage: near receptionist photo (especially A3 variant with props)
aiReceptionistsLabel.style: dark text in white/light rounded rectangle badge

subtleGridPattern.usage: background texture at bottom in ~40% of images
subtleGridPattern.style: very faint grid lines in light gray, barely visible

listicleElements.circleRow: horizontal overlapping circles with company logos, welco headset central and largest (~150px) with blue outline, others ~100-120px
listicleElements.appIconGrid: scattered/organic grid of rounded-square icons (16-20px radius, subtle shadow), welco ~100-120px central, others ~50-70px, curved arrow from competitor to welco

visualStyle.overlayElements: chat conversation bubbles, accent icons, circular/rectangular photo frames
visualStyle.backgroundTexture: solid light blue (#E4ECF7 / #E8F0FE) as default; optional soft gradient (blue to pink/purple); subtle grid pattern at bottom in some images
visualStyle.iconStyle: blue (#004CE6) circular accent icons with white symbols
